summary_one_line: A 1-byte ASCII control char (0x0A/0x0D/0x09) inside CDATA content so xmlCheckCdataPush takes the whitespace true branch instead of returning error.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: CDATA-scanned content bytes that include one of the three exact control codepoints 0x0A, 0x0D, or 0x09 at a position where xmlCheckCdataPush evaluates a sub-0x20 1-byte char; the byte must equal one of those three values, otherwise the else arm at L11353 returns -ix and the blocker true side at L11351 is never taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog's winning seed carries a 0x0A (newline) byte at offset 0x0f embedded in xml-prefixed content, and the per-role overlay shows the winner reaching the call site (L11861-11870 marked [W]) while the true-branch line L11351 was hit, so the control-char equality is satisfied on the winner's path.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile cannot reliably plant the exact 0x0A/0x0D/0x09 comparand on the scanned path; its blocking seeds stall on the false side (L11351 shows T=2 F=2 / T=3 F=15 for the loser i.e. the false arm dominates) and fall through to the else at L11353/L11354 which is marked [L] (loser-only) and returns -ix.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator on top of value_profile: the cmplog CMP buffer records the literal comparands 0x0A/0x0D/0x09 from the equality CMPs at L11351, and I2SRandReplace splices one of those logged bytes directly into the input at the offset feeding c, deterministically satisfying the equality that value_profile's distance-bucket feedback plus havoc cannot land on a single exact byte.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an equality test of a single byte c against the three control codepoints 0xA, 0xD, 0x9 in xmlCheckCdataPush.
When the control-char equality fails the code falls through to the loser-only else returning -ix.
The winner-resolving seed contains a 0x0A byte in its content.
The winner reaches the xmlCheckCdataPush call site while it is loser-unreached.
At the blocker line the loser's false arm dominates over the true arm.
value_profile_cmplog has I2SRandReplace while value_profile does not.
The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over value_profile with an I2S delta.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 6809 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 2 --seed 008ff29e17e42a70` and observed 2 I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depths 10 and 11 of the 12-level ancestor chain, the cmplog/vpc-exclusive signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating a 1-byte equality against 0x0A/0x0D/0x09 reached only after a multi-byte CDATA prefix where value_profile resolves the branch as often as value_profile_cmplog (no I2S advantage).

weakest_evidence_point: The single winner seed shows 0x0A but I cannot directly confirm that exact byte landed at the offset feeding c via I2S substitution rather than incidental havoc, since the byte-diff offsets do not isolate the scanned-content position.
